name: Stuffed Tofu with Minced Meat
description: A savory tofu dish stuffed with a succulent meat filling. Each block of tofu is hollowed out and packed with a perfectly seasoned minced meat, then seared until golden-brown before being braised in a rich, flavorful sauce. From humble, everyday ingredients emerges a taste of home, the most beloved and familiar comfort food found in every street and alleyway.

suspicious.name: Suspicious Stuffed Tofu with Minced Meat
suspicious.description: A savory tofu dish stuffed with a succulent meat filling. The first time you try to pick up a piece, the tofu falls apart completely. The second time, the tofu and filling separate on the spot... Tempting as the aroma is, after failing twice in a row, you've completely lost the will to try again.

normal.name: Stuffed Tofu with Minced Meat
normal.description: A savory tofu dish stuffed with a succulent meat filling. Each block of tofu is hollowed out and packed with a perfectly seasoned minced meat, then seared until golden-brown before being braised in a rich, flavorful sauce. From humble, everyday ingredients emerges a taste of home, the most beloved and familiar comfort food found in every street and alleyway.

delicious.name: Delicious Stuffed Tofu with Minced Meat
delicious.description: A savory tofu dish stuffed with a succulent meat filling. Four golden pieces sit neatly on a wide, gold-rimmed bone china plate. Steam rises in soft, fragrant curls, carrying an aroma that stirs the appetite at once. The tofu is finished in only a few bites, and the amber sauce left behind is too delicious to leave untouched — made to be poured over rice.

special.name: Gilded Chest
special.description: Nicole's specialty. "Surprised? I already knew how to make this a long time ago. Well, back then..." "Lately, I heard from Mr. Nine that it's become popular again in Liyue..." "A treasure chest design, and a culinary icon all in one? I'm a genius..." As a golden "treasure chest" is set before you, a flood of nonstop chatter instantly fills your mind... It could only be Nicole. Your head may be left buzzing from the barrage, but the delight on your taste buds is even more rewarding than opening a luxurious treasure chest.
